_doc: CROSS-SESSION COORDINATION BOARD (Workstream-D, 2026-06-28). ADVISORY, last-writer-wins. Every Claude session registers in `active_sessions` at start and MUST claim `merge_slot` before merging any PR, releasing it after. Purpose: serialize merges so two concurrent sessions don't both drive a merge and force each other into the behind-rebase retest churn (hit twice on 2026-06-28). The LIVE open-PR list (GitHub) is the authoritative real-time signal; this file records intent + the single merge claim. Protocol is binding: see `.claude/skills/session-coordination/SKILL.md` and `docs/CLAUDE-RULES-CANONICAL.md` (multi-session coordination). This board is NOT a hard lock — it is honour-system coordination for the small number of concurrent sessions the operator runs; the real safety net is branch-protection require-up-to-date.

schema.merge_slot: { held_by: <session_id|null>, branch: <str|null>, pr: <int|null>, claimed_at: <iso8601|null> } — at most ONE session holds this at a time. Claim before merge, clear after (merged or aborted).
schema.active_sessions: [ { session_id, branch, intent, started_at, updated_at } ] — one entry per live session; prune your own on exit. Stale entries (>24h, no matching open PR/branch) may be pruned by any session.

active_sessions.intent: M20-X vol_trail donchian sweep DONE: 22/23 honest-negative, 1 MARGINAL pass (trend_donchian_eth vt_cold10_t2.5, wf 4/6). Operator approved building it + paper-testing it. NOW building: live vol-conditional-trail apply path (src/runtime/trail_vol.py) + YAML declare on trend_donchian_eth (executes on bybit_1 PAPER) to learn if the ~4R edge is real. Draft PR, exact diff to operator, merge on approval. Pullback vol_trail sweep also running (#6510). Slot free.

/health-review 2026-07-15 DONE. Merged #6449 (Tier-3 alpaca_live->dry_run, operator-directed) + deploying; merging #6447 (review-skill governance: health-review security+soak sweeps, perf-review real-money benchmark; health-review backlog drain). NOT touching devnull / first-fire items — research session owns them.

RESEARCH: reliable small-TF trading tool (chop-scalp #6479/#6485 MERGED, both negative). New 4-direction program (operator-approved): P1 maker-fee economics re-scorer, P2 order-flow capture clock (forward-only), P3 market-neutral sleeve backtests, P4 P(win) filter attempt-3 (GATED on P2). Tier-1 research only; builds are operator-gated Tier-3 proposals. Trainer runs via relay. Slot free.

PR #6663 (Tier-3, operator-approved merge). Then dashboard+Android Paper=portfolio UI. Also investigating alpaca_paper QQQ stuck-close (issues #6664/#6665).

ML continuation — CLOSE-OUT DONE: PR #6934 MERGED (verification results + M23 P2 findings honest-negative + WS-B coverage). NOW on WS-A (M25 promotion harvest, claimed on #6927): RG4 sweep + chained cycle->readiness running on the trainer; memos/packets to follow on a fresh branch. Slot free.

/health-review 2026-07-19. PR #6926: 4 operator-approved Tier-2 reconciler correctness fixes (INTENT-REDUCE phantom-pnl NULL-defer [reverses #2974 attribution], SHADOW-PKG-ORPHAN shadow_expired relabel, RECONCILE-DUP guard 300->1800s, OPKG-META per-account refusal_causes) + CI fixes (existing orphan test + s012 deploy-unit-drift guard) + the live cross-session coordination board (issue #6927 + settings.json clause-0 + session-coordination skill + docs/claude/coordination-board.md). HOLDING #6926 merge for operator 'merge 6926' nod (the #2974 reversal). Slot free.
